subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy letter hath been received concerning the differences that have arisen among the Afnán with respect to the question of inheritance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید در خصوص اختلاف در مسئله میراث بین حضرات افنان
